findings.description: The URL in the PDF is a hyperlink but is rendered as plain text in the HTML without an anchor tag.
findings.evidence: PDF contains clickable link 'https://edocs.deq.nc.gov/WasteManagement/Welcome.aspx'; HTML renders it as plain text without an <a> tag.

findings.description: The document lacks an h1 title element. The document title/header information (FACT SHEET / DRAFT PERMIT RENEWAL / Safety-Kleen Archdale) is placed in a div with class 'page-header' as plain text rather than as a proper heading. The two section headings are h2 elements but there is no h1 parent.
findings.evidence: HTML has no <h1> tag. Section headings 'Background' and 'Public Comment & Public Hearing' are <h2> elements with no <h1> above them.

findings.description: There is a nested <main> element inside the outer <main>, which is invalid HTML structure, though this is structural rather than content-related.
findings.evidence: The HTML has <main> wrapping the entire body content, and another <main> inside it starting after the first page-header div.
